title: Content Calendar Generator
scenario: Develop a content calendar for a marketing team with 12 social media channels. The calendar should include the date, post type (article, video, image), and a brief description of the content. The marketing team releases content 3 times a week for the next 6 weeks.
constraints: Must include the date and post type for each content item
The content calendar should be in JSON format

evaluationCriteria.description: Each content item includes the correct date, post type, and brief description.
The JSON format is correct and easy to read.
Each social media channel is included in the content calendar.
